snapshot.description:
- Wrap screens in MainListLayout/MainFormLayout.
- Standardize DataTable styling.
- Add 'Thao tác' column.
- Update Receptionist Patient List (Eye/Pen icons, remove row click).
- Update Receptionist Appointment List (Convert to table, Eye icon).
- Update Clinician Appointment List (Stethoscope/Pen/Eye icons).
snapshot.title: Refactor Presentation \u0026 Standardize Tables

changes.newValue: Implemented UI standardization for tables across Receptionist and Clinician roles. Created detailed HistoryTab for EMR based on user image. Updated EMR page with 'Lập Phiếu Khám bệnh' button.
